```
    private static int getLittleEndianInt(final byte[] data, final int index) {
        return ((data[index] & 0xff))
                | ((data[index + 1] & 0xff) << 8)
                | ((data[index + 2] & 0xff) << 16)
                | ((data[index + 3] & 0xff) << 24);
    }
```
